message.content:
Search the collabspace project (both collabspace-server and collabspace-web) for everything related to "feedback" submission and "docType" field. Look for:
1. Backend controller/service/entity/RO/VO related to feedback
2. Frontend components/API calls related to feedback submission
3. SpaceNodeTypeEnum definition
4. Any existing docType field usage

Search in D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server and D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web

Be thorough - check controllers, services, RO classes, entity classes, and frontend API/components.
